Select Theme

    All Classes and Interfaces

    Classes
    Class
    Description
    AddEmployeeController
    Controller class for the Add Employee overlay pane.
    AddMenuItemController
    Controller class for the Add Menu Item overlay pane.
    AddOrderItemController
     
    AdminEmployeeController
    Controller class for (admin) manage employee overlay pane.
    CashierOrderViewController
     
    ClockUtil
    Utility class for maintaining a clock that updates every second.
    DatabaseController
    Class for maintaining one active connection to the database that is commonly used across all classes.
    Employee
    Model class representing an employee in the system.
    EmployeeDAO
    Data Access Object (DAO) class for Employee.
    EmployeeViewLauncher
    Launcher to open the application, starting from login view.
    InventoryController
    Controller for the inventory management view.
    InventoryDAO
    Data access object for retrieving inventory data from the database.
    InventoryItem
     
    LoginController
    Controller class for the login screen.
    Main
     
    ManageMenuItemController
    Controller class for Manage Menu Item overlay pane.
    ManagerEmployeeViewController
    Controller class for the manager employee view.
    ManagerMenuViewController
    Controller class for the manager menu item view.
    MenuDAO
    Data Access Object (DAO) class for MenuItem.
    MenuItem
    Model class representing a menu item in the system.
    MenuViewLauncher
    Launcher to open the manager menu view.
    OrderItem
     
    OrderViewLauncher
     
    ProductUserChartDateSelectionController
     
    ReportsView
    ReportsView is the UI component responsible for generating and displaying manager reports including tables and charts based on database queries.
    SalesReportView
     
    SHA256Hasher
    SHA-256 hasher object to generate the hashes for passwords.
    UpdateEmployeeController
    Controller class for update employee overlay pane.
    UpdateMenuItemController
    Controller class for update menu item overlay pane.
